name: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 175,000 Hilton Honors Bonus Points after spending $6,000 on eligible purchases within the first 6 months of card membership. Offer ends 4/15/26.

earning_rates.notes: Hilton Honors Bonus Points per dollar at hotels and resorts within the Hilton portfolio
Flights booked directly with the airline or through Amex Travel
U.S. restaurants, including takeout and delivery
Car rentals booked directly with select car rental companies

annual_credits.name: Hilton Resort Credit
annual_credits.description: $400 annual Hilton Resort Credit ($200 semi-annually) for room rate or charges at participating Hilton resort properties

annual_credits.name: Airline Credit
annual_credits.description: $200 annual airline credit ($50 quarterly) for airline charges including airfare booked directly or through amextravel.com

annual_credits.name: CLEAR+ Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $209 credit towards a CLEAR+ membership each year

annual_credits.name: Free Night Certificate
annual_credits.description: One Free Night Certificate each cardmember year, valid for a standard room at almost any Hilton Honors property worldwide

annual_credits.name: Luxury Property Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 property credit at Waldorf Astoria and Conrad hotels when booking a 2-night minimum stay through hiltonhonorsaspirecard.com

annual_credits.name: Second Free Night
annual_credits.description: Earn an additional Free Night Certificate after spending $30,000 on eligible purchases in a calendar year

hotel_status.method: Automatic for as long as card is open

other_benefits: Fifth Night Free on reward stays (Silver status or higher)
Cell Phone Protection ($50 deductible, up to $800 per claim)

recurring_credits.name: $400 Hilton Resort Credit
recurring_credits.description: $200 every 6 months for Hilton resort properties.

recurring_credits.name: $209 CLEAR+ Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $209 credit towards CLEAR+ membership.

recurring_credits.name: $100 Luxury Property Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 property credit at Waldorf Astoria and Conrad (2-night min).

recurring_credits.name: Hilton Diamond Status
recurring_credits.description: Complimentary Diamond status - top tier with free breakfast, upgrades, late checkout.

recurring_credits.name: Free Night Certificate
recurring_credits.description: One free night at almost any Hilton property worldwide.
